chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-265 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.1280/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1281/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 26.01.2026. Petitioner is present in person. ------ 1. Urgent application is allowed. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. The Petitioner is present in person and submits that he has made a Complaint before the Wafaqi Mohtasib (Ombudsman)’s Secretariat regarding unjustified excessive/wrong bill/technical fault/load shedding of Industrial Consumer Bill No.AP075337, where he was informed that the Industrial Meters are dealing by the NEPRA Authority and the Petitioner has again submitted an Application before the Respondent No.2/NEPRA, which is pending for more than two years. He further submits that he would be satisfied if directions are issued for the matter to be decided without further delay. So ordered. The Respondent No.2 ought to decide the Application filed by the Petitioner in accordance with law through a speaking Order without undue delay preferably within a period of 45 days from today. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the Respondent No.2 for information and compliance. The Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
